$comment: Source of truth for the upstream AG2 version these skills were verified against. To see what changed upstream since, diff the pinned commit: `git -C <ag2-checkout> diff ag2_commit..main -- autogen/beta` (see scripts/check_drift.sh).
scope_note: These skills document the AG2 Beta API (the `autogen.beta` namespace) ONLY. They do not cover the classic / stable `autogen` API.
verification_method: Every SKILL.md was cross-checked against the autogen.beta source at the pinned commit; example code was executed against ag2==0.13.4.
